full_text:
Wu Anguo 武安國
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wu Anguo (武安國). Served Kong Rong. Wielded an iron mace. Maimed by Lü Bu after fighting ten bouts. Wu Anguo may not have existed in history. Wu Anguo was affiliated with Kong Rong.
